title: Blue Flame Burning
description: Makes soul fire burn entities with a blue flame instead of regular flames
body:
Makes soul fire burn entities with a blue flame instead of regular boring yellow flames when caught fire by a soul fire source.

- Soul Fire, when setting the player or an entity on fire will make the entity burn with a blue flame
- Zombie burning with a blue flame setting other entities on fire, will make those entities burn blue as well
- Support for modded fluids that set the player on fire

The change added by this mod is purely visual.

The mod is required on both sides.

Join my [Discord!](https://discord.gg/69YVMbvhTC)
